/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=thin -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/bench_simd.dir/benchmarks/bench_simd.cpp.o -o bench_simd  _deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a _deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark_main.a _deps/highway-build/libhwy_contrib.a _deps/highway-build/libhwy.a _deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a
